original_image_tags: Document cover with brown diagonal border stripes.

elements.description: Standard FBI document cover sheet with typed text, form fields, a barcode, and a brown diagonal-striped border pattern. Text includes 'U.S. Department of Justice', 'FBI - CENTRAL RECORDS CENTER', 'HQ - HEADQUARTERS', 'Field Office Criminal Investigative and Administrative Files', and various check boxes and numbers (e.g., '0062 83894', '8/11/1274151', 'RRP0031NFTI', '02-83894-A', '1-OPEN'). A blue rectangular stamp at the top right reads 'Declassification authority derived from FBI Automatic Declassification Guide, issued May 24, 2007.'

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the visual content of a document cover with a brown diagonal-striped border, and Description B adds specific text details that do not contradict Description A's general description.
